title: licania minuscula
intro: Licania minuscula, also known as the small licania, is a small tree or shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a member of the family Chrysobalanaceae, and its bark has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments. The medicinal properties of Licania minuscula include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin infections. In herbal preparations, the bark of Licania minuscula can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
